# Alphabet Q3 2026 Earnings Note

Alphabet reported consolidated revenue of $102.7 billion [F2] for Q3 2026, beating consensus by $1.7 billion [C1]. EPS (diluted) came in at $2.15 [F1].

Management strengthened its Search AI commentary. "AI-driven features in Search, including AI Overviews and AI Mode, continue to deliver strong engagement" [L1]

Brian Nowak from Morgan Stanley pressed on the capex step-up. "The increase reflects stronger than expected Cloud demand pull-through, expanded build for our internal Gemini training fleet, and selective infrastructure pre-positioning. Cloud RPO grew 38 percent year over year." [Q1]

Management formalised the capex commitment for fiscal 2026. "we now expect full-year 2026 capex to be approximately 88 billion dollars" [K1]
